rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN MARIE ANDERSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Apportionment Of Statutory Attorney Fee, For Approval Of Extraordinary Fees, And For An Order Directing Payment Of Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/5/19. Filed stamped courtesy copy of petition filed on 7/17/19 and proposed order have not been provided to Room 202 (NB: copies of all other pleadings appear to have been provided). In addition, it does not appear that any of the pleadings filed have been verified by petitioner. See Local Rule 14.18B for verifications after pleadings have already been filed. Please provide any courtesy copies at least 2 weeks prior.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE A. WILLIAMS SR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Authorizing The Personal Representative To Take Possession Of Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/27/19. (No earlier date available.) A Court-appointed fiduciary must sign and verify his own pleadings. [CRC 7.103(c).] Despite Counsel's position, the assets sought to be transferred to the administrator of this estate are held by the administrator of another estate... in his respective representative capacity for each estate. Probate Code Section 850 applies. After procedural issues are addressed, an appearance will be required.
